markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content strategy and proposal for Midi.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Aggressive Content Goal:** Midi aims to scale from 5–8 articles/mo to 50/mo by EOY Q2 2026, driven by a need to capture market share from competitors like HERS and Weight Watchers.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Significant Traffic Opportunity:** GrowthX's analysis projects an additional \~235k organic visits/mo by year-end, split between refreshing existing content (\~25k) and targeting new keywords (\~210k).](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Flexible Pricing Model:** The proposal includes a 2-phase contract: a paid strategy phase, followed by a 12-month editorial phase at 5 articles/week. The weekly volume can flex up to 10 articles at no extra cost if Midi's review process is efficient.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Decision Timeline:** Midi will review the proposal internally and provide a decision by the end of January 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

## Topics

### Midi's Content Goals & Constraints

  - [**Primary Focus:** Dominate content for middle-aged women's health, with a specific emphasis on peri- and post-menopause.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Scaling Target:** Increase editorial output from 5–8 articles/mo to 50/mo by EOY Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Must be human-generated in tone to avoid Google penalties, despite using AI for acceleration.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Review Process:** A critical bottleneck. The goal is to streamline reviews to a 2–3 day turnaround to enable high-volume publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content:** A separate workstream (e.g., location-based SEO) not counted toward the 50-article/mo editorial target.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### GrowthX's Competitive Analysis & Opportunity

  - [**Competitors Analyzed:** HERS and Weight Watchers.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Both have recently launched menopause-focused products, creating an immediate market opportunity for Midi.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Analysis Method:** Identified keyword gaps between Midi and its competitors, filtering out branded terms and irrelevant topics (e.g., "diet").](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**Projected Traffic Lift (Year 1):**](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Refresh:** \~25k additional visits/mo from optimizing existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Net New:** \~210k additional visits/mo from targeting new keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Total Projected Lift:** \~235k additional organic visits/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Assumptions:**](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Refresh:** Assumes a conservative 1% traffic capture rate on new keywords, compared to Midi's current 8% rate on its existing keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Net New:** Focused on keywords where Midi ranks 2–40, targeting realistic gains.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### GrowthX's Proposal & Pricing

  - [**Contract Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy):** Paid phase for setup (artifacts, calibration, 5–10 articles), with an opt-out option before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Editorial):** 12-month term at 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Pricing Flexibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Volume:** Weekly output can increase to 10 articles at no extra cost if Midi's review process is efficient enough to support it.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Payment:** GrowthX is flexible on payment terms (e.g., monthly vs. annual upfront).](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Scope:** Additional workstreams (e.g., tools, microsites) would be added to the scope and cost.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Send the Statement of Work (SoW) and competitive analysis deck to Midi.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [**Midi:**](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [Review the proposal internally.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [Provide a decision by the end of January 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [Request an intro to the Airbyte reference if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/C6TARirU1zbP892r3iU6hAqzgL9ZDkh4?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
